allow:
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File - <<'PSEOF'
$shell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell
$shortcut = $shell.CreateShortcut\("H:\\GameLauncher\\GameLauncher BigScreen.lnk"\)
Write-Host "Target:" $shortcut.TargetPath
Write-Host "WorkDir:" $shortcut.WorkingDirectory
PSEOF)
